purpose: Deterministic checks contributed to /gate. Each entry names its owning PACK, so uninstalling a pack removes its checks instead of leaving the kernel skill instructing an agent to run a script that is gone. Run by .claude/scripts/run-gate-checks.js; the kernel /gate skill invokes the runner rather than naming these scripts inline.

triggers.exists:<path>: only when that path exists in the project
triggers.changed:<glob>: only when a changed file matches the glob

semantics: blocking:true means a non-zero exit is a BLOCK. blocking:false means a non-zero exit is a WARN that appears on the quality card. A script that is absent because its pack is not installed is recorded as skipped — reported, never silently passed. lane_only:true keeps a check out of the default /gate set; it runs only when named in --only.

checks.summary: Checksums every snapshot against the approved baseline (specs/test_artefacts/approved-snapshots.json).
checks.remediation: A modified approved snapshot or a new unapproved one. Review the change, then re-bless with: npm run approve-fixtures -- --all (or -- --snapshots <files>).

checks.summary: Runs oasdiff breaking between the OpenAPI spec at the git base and the working tree.
checks.remediation: A breaking API change. Either make the change backward-compatible, or version the endpoint. oasdiff not installed is a non-blocking note.

checks.summary: New import cycle vs the monotonic baseline in .claude/state/.
checks.remediation: Break the new cycle, or invert the dependency. Removing a cycle ratchets the baseline down.

checks.summary: New unstable hub (fan_in >= 5, instability >= 0.8) vs the monotonic baseline.
checks.remediation: Extract a narrower interface, or split the module's responsibilities. The gate names the specific hub with its fan-in/instability numbers.

checks.summary: Wraps jscpd over changed source; compares clone occurrences to .claude/state/duplication-baseline.txt.
checks.remediation: Extract the duplicated block to a shared unit, or justify it. jscpd not installed skips loudly.

checks.summary: Changed files must appear in the REASONS Canvas Governs or Operations sections.
checks.remediation: Update the Canvas first (fix-the-prompt-first), then rerun. A valid specs/reviews/sensor-waivers.json entry can cover a deliberate mismatch.

checks.summary: Pairs changed governed files with the Canvas narrative claims a diff can falsify; the code-reviewer judges each claim.
checks.remediation: A claim the code no longer satisfies is a WARN. Fix the Canvas prose first, never silently.

checks.summary: Every changed source file must be owned by a story in the component map.
checks.remediation: Assign the file to its owning story in component-map.md, then rerun. empty_map (the map parsed to zero entries) also blocks.

checks.summary: Re-runs every accumulated e2e spec and every prior group's sprint-contract api_checks under HARNESS_TEST_REPLAY=1.
checks.remediation: A previously-passing e2e spec or prior contract check now fails — this is a regression, not a flake (quarantined flakes are excluded). Fix the regression.

checks.summary: BLOCK-level swallowed exceptions and empty catch blocks in changed production source.
checks.remediation: Handle or propagate the error. A swallowed exception makes a production failure invisible.

checks.summary: N+1-in-loop and sync-in-async patterns in changed production source.
checks.remediation: Batch the query, or move the sync call off the async path. Unbounded-load findings are WARN only.
Surviving mutants in a critical module mean the tests do not actually constrain it. unprovisioned is a non-blocking note.

checks.summary: Validates waiver fields and expiry against .claude/templates/sensor-waivers.schema.json.
checks.remediation: Fix or remove the invalid waiver. A malformed waiver must never silently suppress a finding.

checks.summary: Impact-scoped regression (G16): deterministic TIA over code-graph.json selects only the affected prior group's e2e/contract checks. LANE-ONLY — the fast per-iteration complement to regression-suite-full, which /gate runs unabridged. Reached via --only local-regression from /change and /vibe.
checks.remediation: An earlier story's behaviour regressed. Fix the regression — do not narrow the scope. Run the full sweep (regression-suite-full) before merge.
